mapper.select: /* TM_ME10002_Dao_retrieveBudgetExcutList */ SELECT slip_no, ecs_setcsc_div_cd, ecs_chrg_dept_id, iem_tit_ctnt, entrps_nm, slip_pstde, excut_amt, sum_amt, charger_id, iem_dtl_ctnt FROM tm_me10002 WHERE ecs_chrg_dept_id = #{ecsChrgDeptId} AND slip_pstde BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4) || '0101' AND SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4) || '1231'
mapper.update: /* TM_ME10002_Dao_saveBudgetExcut */ MERGE INTO tm_me10002 A USING ( SELECT #{slipNo} AS slip_no, #{ecsSetcscDivCd} AS ecs_setcsc_div_cd, #{ecsChrgDeptId} AS ecs_chrg_dept_id, #{iemTitCtnt} AS iem_tit_ctnt, #{entrpsNm} AS entrps_nm, #{slipPstde} AS slip_pstde, #{excutAmt} AS excut_amt, #{sumAmt} AS sum_amt, #{chargerId} AS charger_id, #{iemDtlCtnt} AS iem_dtl_ctnt, #{frstRgstrId} AS frst_rgstr_id, #{lastUpdusrId} AS last_updusr_id, #{updtRsn} AS updt_rsn, #{lrgeChckAtchflNm} AS lrge_chck_atchfl_nm, #{lrgeChckAtchFlpth} AS lrge_chck_atch_flpth, #{dcompChckAtchflNm} AS dcomp_chck_atchfl_nm, #{dcompChckAtchFlpth} AS dcomp_chck_atch_flpth FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.slip_no = B.slip_no AND A.ecs_chrg_dept_id = B.ecs_chrg_dept_id ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.ecs_setcsc_div_cd = B.ecs_setcsc_div_cd, A.iem_tit_ctnt = B.iem_tit_ctnt, A.entrps_nm = B.entrps_nm, A.slip_pstde = B.slip_pstde, A.excut_amt = B.excut_amt, A.sum_amt = B.sum_amt, A.charger_id = B.charger_id, A.iem_dtl_ctnt = B.iem_dtl_ctnt, A.last_updt_dt = SYSDATE, A.last_updusr_id = B.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn = B.updt_rsn, A.lrge_chck_atchfl_nm = B.lrge_chck_atchfl_nm, A.lrge_chck_atch_flpth = B.lrge_chck_atch_flpth, A.dcomp_chck_atchfl_nm = B.dcomp_chck_atchfl_nm, A.dcomp_chck_atch_flpth = B.dcomp_chck_atch_flpth WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.slip_no, A.ecs_setcsc_div_cd, A.ecs_chrg_dept_id, A.iem_tit_ctnt, A.entrps_nm, A.slip_pstde, A.excut_amt, A.sum_amt, A.charger_id, A.iem_dtl_ctnt, A.frst_regist_dt, A.frst_rgstr_id, A.last_updt_dt, A.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn, A.lrge_chck_atchfl_nm, A.lrge_chck_atch_flpth, A.dcomp_chck_atchfl_nm, A.dcomp_chck_atch_flpth ) VALUES ( B.slip_no, B.ecs_setcsc_div_cd, B.ecs_chrg_dept_id, B.iem_tit_ctnt, B.entrps_nm, B.slip_pstde, B.excut_amt, B.sum_amt, B.charger_id, B.iem_dtl_ctnt, SYSDATE, B.frst_rgstr_id, SYSDATE, B.last_updusr_id, B.updt_rsn, B.lrge_chck_atchfl_nm, B.lrge_chck_atch_flpth, B.dcomp_chck_atchfl_nm, B.dcomp_chck_atch_flpth )
